title: TechZeph Portfolio
summary: A static Astro portfolio for TechZeph that presents project work, lightweight case studies, contact details, and GitHub-synced project metadata.
complexityNotes: Layered static site with file-based routes, reusable Astro components, semantic light/dark theme tokens, GitHub-generated project data, favicon/web manifest assets, and documentation templates for future portfolio and theme-system work.
currentState: Core public routes, shared layout components, project index/detail pages, theme controls, GitHub project sync, and documentation are in place. TODO notes show ongoing refinement of UI, copy, project cards, and future customer-site starter extraction.
